title: Clean Glass +
description: Clean Glass - By Abelosky. Ultra-clean, modern glass textures. Includes tinted and normal glass, fully compatible 1.13+. Ideal for survival, creative, and building servers.
body:
# Clean Glass - By Abelosky

Ultra-clean, modern glass textures for Minecraft.  

![All glasses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f42ae875aab81935089ce75edb90120907f63d6.png)

**Features:**
- ✔ Normal glass with ultra-clean transparency  
- ✔ All 16 tinted glass colors  
- ✔ Tinted glass (Amethyst) included  
- ✔ Compatible with Minecraft 1.13 – 1.21+  
- ✔ Works perfectly in Survival, Creative, and building servers  

**Notes:**
- Fully optimized for performance  
- Minimalist style for aesthetic builds  
- Ideal for players who love clean, modern textures  

**Author:** Abelosky  
**Pack type:** Resource Pack / Textures  
**License:** All rights reserved
